allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('@anthropic-ai/sdk:', deps.get\('@anthropic-ai/sdk','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('All deps:', list\(deps.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('has_resume_en:', d.get\('has_resume_en'\), '  has_resume_fr:', d.get\('has_resume_fr'\), '  has_avatar:', d.get\('has_avatar'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['has_resume_en','has_resume_fr','name'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('has_resume_en:', d.get\('has_resume_en'\), '  has_resume_fr:', d.get\('has_resume_fr'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\), len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else 'not a list'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\).__name__, '- count:', len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else 'N/A'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5] if isinstance\(d,dict\) else 'ok'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('jobs type:', type\(d\).__name__, 'keys/len:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:3] if isinstance\(d,dict\) else len\(d\)\)")
